name: Bell Pepper Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Place the bell peppers under the broiler and lightly char, turning to grill all sides. Remove from the broiler to a paper bag. Close the bag and set aside until cool.
3. When the peppers are cool, peel, core, and seed them. Cut into strips.
4. Arrange the pepper strips on a platter, alternating colors so they form a petal pattern.
5. Spoon the Creamy garlic dressing over the peppers.
6. Sprinkle with black pepper.
7. Garnish with capers and serve warm or chilled.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 30; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 6g; PRO: 2g; SOD: 67mg; FAT: 0g
Source: Light and Easy Diabetes Cusine by Betty Marks
